---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---




```{r}

k <- 1
n <- 100
mean <- 0
var <- 1
skew <- 0
kurtosis <- 0
cor <- diag(1, k)

test <- headrick_method(k = k, n = n, mean = mean, var = var, 
                skew = skew, kurtosis = kurtosis)

generate_correlated(n = 1000, mean = 0, var = 1, 
                    skew = 0, kurt = 0,
                    replication = 1)

```

```{r}

generate_distribution(distribution = "weibull", alpha_shape = 1)

```

```{r}

generate_correlated(n = 1000, mean = 0, var = 1, 
                    skew = 0, kurt = 0,
                    replication = 1)

```
